data.description: Themed bundle of 8 small upstream cmux issues affecting input handling. Picks: #3061, #1456, #3096, #3069, #1469, #1153, #2105, #2949. Reporters to credit: @wada811, @DaikiHayata, @tmad4000, @jewel-sallylab, @alceal, @sldx, @freshtonic, @shaun0927. Plus related-issue reporters whose duplicates close with the same fix: @AndreySoloviev (#2756), @pankrusheff (#2891). Full rationale + per-pick credits in task note.
data.title: Upstream pull: Input handling — keyboard, IME, paste, clipboard, signals (8 picks)

data.body: Phase 2 PR-status scan complete. Of the 8 picks: **3 have an open upstream PR** (#1456 → PR #3105 by @melank, #2105 → PR #2663 by @austinywang, #2949 → PR #2953 by @shaun0927 [self-fix]), **4 have no fixing PR yet** (#3061, #3096, #3069, #1469), and **1 has a historical closed-without-merge PR** (#1153 → PR #2246 by @pandec closed; PR #1438 by @shouryamaanjain still open as a second attempt). Full status: code/c11-private/upstream-watch/picks/2026-04-26-pr-status.md (C11-21 section).
